title: Virginia DDS Pay-Scale Research Notes
description: Narrative research notes for Virginia DDS examiner and supervisor pay: administering agency (DARS DDS Division), DDS Analyst role codes (Trainee 1 #ARSD0134, Journey #ARSD0315, Junior #ARSD0436, Supervisor — Line Unit #ARSD0252), pay-band assignments (Band 4 examiner / Band 5 supervisor) and FY26 DARS-internal starting salaries ($54,106 → $69,479; $105,212 supervisor), the DHRM Classified Salary Structure (eff 2025-06-10), the separate VA DDS salary model, and no-collective-bargaining status. Companion to VA/scheduled-rates.json.

source.publisher: Virginia Department of Human Resource Management (DHRM); DARS Disability Determination Services Division
source.title: VA DDS salary research notes (jobs.virginia.gov role codes + DHRM FY26 structure + DARS salary model)

notes: Authoritative: official DARS role codes (ARSD0134/0315/0436/0252) and pay-band assignments cited from jobs.virginia.gov, with real FY26 DARS-internal starting salaries and the DHRM Classified Salary Structure (eff 2025-06-10, 3% increase). CAVEAT: VA pay bands are very wide, so starting salaries (not band maxes) are the realistic comparator; the legacy DDS salary-model F1–F4 supervisor figures may differ from the current DHRM NV 5 band. No collective bargaining for VA state employees.
